marketNews.headline: stock futures today: Why are US stock market futures up today, and will S&P 500, Dow Jones and Nasdaq stay in green or turn red again? Wall Street futures, stocks to watch, analyst. Major companies including Boeing, Tesla, and Adobe moved in premarket trading.

items.summary: Major companies including Boeing, Tesla, and Adobe moved in premarket trading. Analysts say markets want stability but risks remain. Investors are now watching earnings, geopolitics, inflation, and consumer strength.

thoughts.headline: trend alignment is required
thoughts.thesis: Rule violation or insufficient setup quality
thoughts.whatCanBreakIt: The main concern is that the setup never develops real relative strength and simply drifts without confirming the thesis.
thoughts.whatWouldChangeMind: AutoBot would change its mind if price damage reaches roughly 0% or if the broader thesis clearly stops matching the tape.
thoughts.whyItCanWork: AutoBot is not pressing harder here, but it still sees enough structure to avoid treating the position as broken.

thoughts.headline: Configured hard stop condition is met.
thoughts.thesis: Configured hard stop condition is met.
thoughts.whatCanBreakIt: The bot thinks the balance of evidence has shifted against the trade, so waiting for a cleaner signal matters less than reducing risk.
thoughts.whatWouldChangeMind: AutoBot would change its mind if price damage reaches roughly 0% or if the broader thesis clearly stops matching the tape.
thoughts.whyItCanWork: AutoBot is not pressing harder here, but it still sees enough structure to avoid treating the position as broken.
